items.title: Dealership Process Playbook
items.summary: A structured playbook initiative for documenting management expectations, departmental handoffs, customer-process standards, and the routines that support better daily execution.

items.title: CRM Follow-Up Framework
items.summary: A practical framework for improving lead follow-up consistency, manager visibility, task ownership, and customer communication standards throughout the sales process.

items.title: Fixed Operations Training Modules
items.summary: A training initiative focused on service process, advisor communication, internal coordination, and the reinforcement of consistent operating standards inside fixed operations.

items.title: Executive Reporting & Workflow Dashboard
items.summary: A reporting and workflow concept intended to give leaders clearer visibility into activity levels, bottlenecks, missed follow-up, and coaching opportunities across the operating model.
